title: May 28th, 2020 (2)
body:
- daily notes
    - akabilly
        - work notes
            - at home i can defend my home court (my private virtual court or nearby courts i've earned remote access to). from abroad, i can search the global map and see what teams control what regions. i can challenge that team for control of the region by defeating its gamers on their home courts. if the visiting player wins, they flip a home team poi to their own team's control. if the home player wins, they earn prizes worth the risk. when actual nba/wnba teams travel to cities, we flip a bunch of pois to that team to encourage its fans to come challenging and to force the home team to defend against
    - professional
        - lyrics
            - i'm trying to follow this thread here, do you see it? yes? good. see it goes here over there then through here in then right back out then there's this little tangle and it comes out over on this side see then this way along with a bunch of other threads then it splits off here and then i lose it. do you see? no? st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] following the thread and i will follow you. tell me when you get lost. good? good. let's go
    - professional
